news.headline: OptiSigns to showcase digital signage solutions as Platinum Sponsor at DSE 2024 in Vegas.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Houston, OptiSigns, a prominent provider of digital signage software solutions, shared its excitement about being a Platinum Sponsor at Digital Signage Experience (DSE) 2024 in Las Vegas, Nevada. The event is scheduled for December and is set to be a major industry gathering.

news.headline: Founder Jeff Sarmiento successfully transitions ownership of Greater Bay Plumbing to buyer Dan, facilitated by Viking Mergers & Acquisitions.
news.summary: With the assistance of Viking Mergers & Acquisitions, a deal was completed in Sarasota, Florida on December 2, 2024. Jeffrey Sarmiento, the founder of Greater Bay Plumbing, has handed over ownership of the business to Dan, a strategic buyer. Over the years, Sarmiento transformed Greater Bay Plumbing into the top plumbing service provider in Sarasota.

news.headline: CAVA (NYSE: CAVA) to participate in Morgan Stanley Global Consumer and Retail Conference on Dec 4, 2024. CEO and CFO will attend.
news.summary: WASHINGTON--CAVA Group, Inc. (NYSE: CAVA) revealed its involvement in the Morgan Stanley Global Consumer and Retail Conference on December 4, 2024. Brett Schulman, Co-Founder and CEO, alongside Tricia Tolivar, CFO, will engage in 1x1 meetings and a fireside chat at 10:15 AM EST. The event's replay and fireside chat will be accessible afterwards.

news.headline: Seritage Growth Properties repaid $15 million toward $1.6 billion loan from Berkshire Hathaway, totaling $1.36 billion repaid since Dec 2021.
news.summary: Seritage Growth Properties (SRG), a real estate company specializing in retail, residential, and mixed-use properties, disclosed a voluntary prepayment of $15 million on November 27, 2024, towards its $1.6 billion term loan from Berkshire Hathaway Life Insurance Company of Nebraska. This prepayment brings the total repayments to $1.36 billion since December 2021. This move demonstrates the Company's commitment to reducing its debt and improving its financial position.

news.headline: BIP Investment Corp. to redeem all Series 1 Preferred Shares after special meeting voting results, on Dec. 5, 2024.
news.summary: Brookfield Infrastructure Partners L.P.'s subsidiary, BIP Investment Corporation (BIPIC), reported the outcome of the special meeting for holders of its senior preferred shares, series 1. The meeting, held virtually on Dec. 02, 2024, revealed that BIPIC plans to redeem all existing Preferred Shares for cash on December 5, 2024. BIPIC's ticker symbols are TSX: BIK.PR.A, while Brookfield Infrastructure's tickers are NYSE: BIP and TSX: BIP.UN.

news.headline: Dow Jones dipped, Intel's gains faded after CEO exit. Warren Buffett stock on 44% run clears entry. Tesla rose.
news.summary: Today, the stock market experienced a decline with the Dow Jones dropping, despite one of Warren Buffett's stocks making a significant entry. Tesla saw an increase in its standing on the market, whereas Intel's gains diminished. The CEO exit at Intel seemed to affect its performance negatively. It is noteworthy that the Warren Buffett stock that showed promising growth managed to clear the entry by a notable 44%. Overall, the market presented mixed results with these key players making waves.

news.headline: Lumina Gold to draw US$6 million from US$300 million deal with Wheaton Precious Metals.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on December 2, 2024, Lumina Gold Corp. (TSXV: LUM) (OTCQB: LMGDF) shared news about their agreement with Wheaton Precious Metals International Ltd. The company happily reported on the US$300 million precious metals purchase arrangement (PMPA) with Wheaton.

news.headline: Centerspace to pay $0.75 per share as quarterly dividend on Jan 13, 2025, for shareholders and unitholders.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Centerspace's Board of Trustees revealed their decision to issue a standard quarterly distribution of $0.75 per share/unit. This dividend will be distributed on January 13, 2025, to all common shareholders and unitholders who are recorded as such by the end of business on the allocated date.

news.headline: Energy Services of America acquires Tribute Contracting & Consultants, LLC, an underground utility contractor. (Characters: 103)
news.summary: Energy Services of America Corporation, a publicly traded company listed on Nasdaq under the symbol ESOA, recently finalized the acquisition of Tribute Contracting & Consultants, LLC in Huntington, West Virginia on December 2, 2024. Tribute is recognized as a leading underground utility contractor employing a significant number of workers. This transaction marks a significant milestone for Energy Services as they enhance their portfolio and expand their operations within the sector.

news.headline: ADC Therapeutics in Switzerland grants 34,900 options to new employees under Inducement Plan, as a leader in ADCs.
news.summary: In Lausanne, Switzerland on December 2, 2024, ADC Therapeutics SA (NYSE: ADCT), a prominent player in antibody drug conjugates, revealed the granting of options to acquire a total of 34,900 shares of the company. This move marks a significant development for the commercial-stage global leader in the industry.

news.headline: Provident Bancorp, Inc. adopts stock repurchase program. Board approves plan allowing company to repurchase shares.
news.summary: Today, Provident Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq: PVBC), the holding company for BankProv, shared its decision to implement a new stock repurchase program. The Board of Directors approved this program, allowing the company to buy back shares. The details of the program specify that the Company may repurchase up to a certain number of shares, providing a potential benefit to its shareholders. This move demonstrates the Company's confidence in its financial position and future performance.

news.headline: J.M. Smucker Co. sells Voortman® brand to Second Nature Brands, updates net sales outlook for FY 2025.
news.summary: A company based in Orrville, Ohio, revealed on December 2, 2024, that they have completed the sale of their Voortman® business to Second Nature Brands. The company, known as The J.M. Smucker Co. and traded on NYSE under the ticker symbol SJM, had initially disclosed the agreement for this transaction.

news.headline: Revolution Medicines, Inc. starts public offering of common stock to raise up to $600 million, with an option to add $90 million more.
news.summary: Revolution Medicines, Inc., based in Redwood City, California, announced on December 2, 2024, that it has started an underwritten public offering to sell a maximum of $600.0 million worth of its common stock (Nasdaq: RVMD). The company, focused on developing targeted therapies for patients with RAS-addicted cancers, is offering all the shares of common stock. Additionally, Revolution Medicines plans to provide the underwriters a 30-day option to buy up to an additional $90.0 million of common stock. The completion of the offering, as well as its size and terms, depends on market and other conditions, with no definite assurance on its finalization timeframe.

news.headline: BWXT team secures $3 billion contract for DOE's West Valley Project for cleanup.
news.summary: A team led by BWXT has recently been granted a significant contract worth $3 billion for the cleanup of the Department of Energy's West Valley Demonstration Project in Lynchburg, Virginia. This contract signifies a substantial investment in environmental remediation efforts and reflects the urgency of addressing the challenges posed by the project.

news.headline: Altus Power CEO to attend NY conferences on Dec 4 and 5; largest clean power provider. #AltusPower #RenewableEnergy.
news.summary: Altus Power, a leading provider of clean electric power, shared that CEO Gregg Felton is set to speak at upcoming industry events. These include a fireside chat at the Jefferies Renewables & Clean Energy Conference on December 4 and a panel discussion at the Bank of America Clean Energy Symposium on December 5, both in New York. The company, listed on NYSE as AMPS, focuses on large-scale commercial clean energy solutions. Felton's participation highlights Altus Power's commitment to addressing rising energy demand.

news.headline: Fed’s Williams: What the Fed does with policy depends on incoming data.
Fed’s Williams: Monetary policy remains in restrictive stance.
Fed’s Williams: The job market unlikely to be source of higher inflation.
Fed’s Williams: I expect inflation to continue to gradually ebb to 2%.
Total number of voting rights and shares held by a company as of Nov 30, 2024, disclosed in a news article.
news.summary: As of November 30, 2024, the Company has disclosed that the total number of voting rights stands at X and the total number of shares amounts to Y.

news.headline: MacroGenics (Nasdaq: MGNX) to partake in investor conference for cancer therapeutics on Dec. 02, 2024.
news.summary: MacroGenics, Inc., a biopharmaceutical company listed on Nasdaq as MGNX and specializing in monoclonal antibody-based cancer therapeutics, will have its management team attend an upcoming investor conference in December 2024. The company, based in Rockville, MD, is dedicated to discovering, developing, and marketing innovative treatments for cancer. Its participation in the conference signifies its commitment to engaging with investors and sharing insights about its operations.

news.headline: Erik Mayer named VP of Clean Energy Solutions at CF Industries, focusing on decarbonization, low-carbon ammonia/nitrogen products.
news.summary: Northbrook, Illinois - CF Industries Holdings, Inc. revealed the appointment of Erik Mayer as vice president of clean energy solutions. Mayer, now leading the strategic initiative on decarbonization and clean energy, will oversee the production of low-carbon ammonia and nitrogen products. Additionally, he will focus on expanding the clean energy solutions team within CF Industries. Mayer aims to boost collaboration across the company while exploring new applications for clean energy products. CF Industries is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol CF.

news.headline: NN, Inc. CFO Chris Bohnert to present at Noble Capital Markets' NobleCon20 on Dec. 3 at Florida Atlantic Univ. Meeting investors.
news.summary: An industrial company, NN, Inc., publicly traded on NASDAQ under NNBR, specializing in high-precision components and assemblies, shared news that Chris Bohnert, the CFO, will speak at the Noble Capital Markets’ NobleCon20 Twentieth Annual Emerging Growth Equity Conference. This event will take place at Florida Atlantic University, Executive Education Complex on Dec. 3, 2024, at 1:30 p.m. ET. During the conference, management will engage in one-on-one and group sessions with investors attending the event.

news.headline: Voyageur Mineral Explorers Corp. appointed Brian Howlett to its Board, with Ross Orr stepping down. Howlett has 35 years experience and currently serves as CEO of Hemlo Explorers Inc. and Independent Chairman of Bitfarms Ltd. Howlett graduated in 1982 with a B. Comm. in finance from Concordia University and received his CMA designation in 1989.
news.summary: In Toronto on December 2, 2024, Voyageur Mineral Explorers Corp. (CSE: VOY) has officially added Brian Howlett to its Board of Directors. With over 35 years of experience in both operational and financial roles, Howlett currently serves as the Chief Executive Officer of Hemlo Explorers Inc. and as the Independent Chairman of Bitfarms Ltd. He earned his B. Comm. in finance from Concordia University in 1982 and achieved his CMA designation in 1989. Howlett's appointment follows the departure of Ross Orr from the Board.

news.headline: Jasper Therapeutics doses first patient in phase 1b/2a study of briquilimab for asthma. Study name: ETESIAN, evaluating single briquilimab dose in asthma patients.
news.summary: Redwood City, California, December 02, 2024 - Jasper Therapeutics, Inc. announced that the first patient has been dosed in their Phase 1b/2a clinical challenge study, ETESIAN, assessing briquilimab for allergic asthma. Jasper, a biotech company traded as JSPR on Nasdaq, is developing briquilimab, an antibody therapy targeting c-Kit (CD117) for conditions like chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU), chronic inducible urticaria (CIndU), and asthma. The study involves a single subcutaneous dose of briquilimab in asthma patients.

news.headline: Fed’s Williams: Further progress on inflation may be uneven.
Fed’s Williams: I see unemployment rate between 4%-4.25% over coming months.
Fed’s Williams: I expect US GDP at 2.5% this year, might be higher.
Fed’s Williams: I expect US inflation around 2.25% for 2024.
Fed’s Williams: Outlook for economy and policy remains highly uncertain.
Fed’s Williams: The US economy in good place, labor market is solid, in balance.
Empire State Building in NYC celebrates holidays with extravagant décor, movie screenings, and tower lightings. President highlights NYC as top holiday destination.
news.summary: Today, the Empire State Building (ESB) in New York unveiled plans for its beloved holiday celebrations, featuring extravagant decorations, themed pop-up events, iconic movie showings, and unique tower illuminations. Jean-Yves Ghazi, president of the Empire State Building Observatory, emphasized the unparalleled holiday experience in the city, with the ESB at the forefront. Guests can enjoy various activities, including photo opportunities with Santa and screenings of timeless films. This festive extravaganza promises to be a must-see attraction in NYC.

news.headline: Crane Company to sell Engineered Materials segment to KPS Capital Partners for $227 million, marking significant move.
news.summary: A deal has been finalized for Crane Company to sell its Engineered Materials business to KPS Capital Partners, LP for $227 million. Max Mitchell, the Chairman of the Board, President, and CEO of Crane Company, stated that this move is a significant progression in the company's strategic actions. Crane, a renowned industrial manufacturing and technology firm, continues to make strategic decisions to enhance its business operations.

news.headline: John Hancock closed-end Preferred Income Fund declares monthly distribution on Dec 2, 2024. Payment date: Dec 19, 2024.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, in Boston, the John Hancock closed-end Preferred Income Fund announced its monthly distribution schedule. The key dates for this distribution are as follows: Declaration Date - December 2, 2024; Ex Date - December 12, 2024; Record Date - December 12, 2024; Payment Date - December 19, 2024. This distribution is applicable to investors of the Ticker Fund Name.

news.headline: Prep for digital euro CBDC ongoing with discussion on holding limit and privacy. Potential launch decision in October 2025.
news.summary: Efforts are ongoing to prepare for the launch of the digital Euro Central Bank Digital Currency (CBDC), aiming for a possible decision on the launch by October 2025.

news.headline: John Hancock closed-end funds declared monthly distributions on Dec 2, 2024. Ex Date: Dec 12, Record Date: Dec 12, Payment Date: Dec 31.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, John Hancock's closed-end funds announced their monthly distributions. The declaration date was December 2, 2024, with the ex-date and record date set for December 12, 2024. Payments are scheduled to be made on December 31, 2024. This update applies to multiple funds listed under various tickers with specific fund names.

news.headline: John Hancock closed-end funds announce quarterly distributions for December 2024. Ex Date: Dec 12, Payment Date: Dec 31.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, the John Hancock closed-end funds announced their quarterly distributions schedule: Declaration Date and Ex Date on December 2, 2024, Record Date on December 12, 2024, and Payment Date on December 31, 2024. Investors can expect distributions from various funds, with more specific details available under each fund's ticker symbol.

news.headline: Nauticus Robotics signs deal with second global supermajor oil & gas company for subsea field inspection in GOM.
news.summary: Nauticus Robotics, Inc., a prominent player in autonomous subsea robotics and software, announced on December 2, 2024, that they successfully finished a project for a major oil and gas corporation in the Gulf of Mexico. This marks their second undertaking for a global supermajor company in the region. The project involved conducting a subsea field inspection, showcasing their expertise in this area. Nauticus Robotics, Inc. operates under the ticker symbol KITT on the NASDAQ stock exchange. This achievement highlights their growing influence in the industry and solidifies their position as a key player in the market.

news.headline: Design studio Secret Creative in Akron, Ohio announces leadership expansion with Hannah Allozi joining ownership team.
news.summary: A design and branding studio in Akron, Ohio is bolstering its leadership team to enhance its focus on purpose-driven creativity. Secret Creative, based in Northeast Ohio, revealed on December 2, 2024, via a press release, that Hannah Allozi has joined the ownership group.

news.headline: Aflac Inc. increases Q1 2025 dividend by 16% to $0.58/share, payable on March 3, 2025. Board of Directors announced.
news.summary: In Columbus, Georgia, on December 2, 2024, Aflac Incorporated (NYSE: AFL) disclosed that the first quarter dividend has been declared at $0.58 per share. Shareholders of record by February 19, 2025, will receive the payment on March 3, 2025.

news.headline: United States set to reveal $725M arms deal for Ukraine.
Rayonier, Inc. has announced a new $300 million share repurchase authorization, replacing its previous $100 million authorization.
news.summary: Rayonier Inc, a company listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol RYN, recently disclosed a significant development. The board of directors has greenlit a fresh $300 million allocation for share repurchases. This new approval replaces the previous authorization of $100 million. The repurchasing of shares can be executed at management's discretion either through open market operations or privately negotiated deals. It is crucial to note that this program does not have any specified expiration period.

news.headline: Fed's Waller leaning towards voting for a rate cut, signaling potential shift in policy. #FederalReserve #RateCut
G.M. to sell stake in Michigan EV battery plant to LG, making LG the sole owner.
news.summary: LG Energy Solution has decided to take full ownership of a factory in Michigan that was initially set to be operated as a joint venture with General Motors. The factory, located in Michigan, will now be solely owned by LG Energy Solution, marking a significant development in their operations in the region. This decision comes after plans to establish a joint venture with General Motors fell through. The factory in Michigan is a key asset for LG Energy Solution, representing a critical part of their manufacturing and production capabilities. The move to solely own the factory emphasizes their commitment to expanding their presence and investments in the region. This strategic decision underscores LG Energy Solution's dedication to advancing their operations and solidifying their position in the market.

news.headline: Crypto-related shares like HUT, MARA, and RIOT drop as Bitcoin pulls back near $100,000. $457 million outflows seen last week.
news.summary: Stocks of cryptocurrency-related firms Hut 8 Corp. (NASDAQ:HUT), MARA Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ:MARA), and Riot Platforms Inc. (NASDAQ:RIOT) are declining today as Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC/USD) retraces from its recent climb close to $100,000. Notably, investments connected to Bitcoin witnessed a considerable $457 million outflow last week, the largest since the beginning of the year. This information is accessible in more detail on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Standard Motor Products (SMP) launches over 2,500 ABS Sensor SKUs for import and domestic vehicles on Dec. 2, 2024.
news.summary: On December 2, 2024, Standard Motor Products, Inc. revealed its ongoing growth in the ABS Sensor program, boasting a substantial increase to approximately 2,500 Stock Keeping Units (SKUs) tailored for both import and domestic vehicles. The renowned Standard® ABS Sensors are meticulously crafted to prioritize precision, efficiency, and longevity in their performance.

news.headline: Ingram Micro (NYSE: INGM) plans to cut 850 jobs by Q1 2025 for long-term growth and organizational efficiency.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Ingram Micro Holding Corporation (NYSE: INGM) revealed plans to implement a restructuring program that will result in a decrease of around 850 employees by the conclusion of the first quarter of 2025. The objective of these initiatives is to improve operational efficiency and bolster customer service operations, ultimately positioning the company more effectively for sustained growth in the future. As part of its regular practices, Ingram Micro is dedicated to...

news.headline: Workiva Inc. (NYSE:WK) to join Raymond James 2024 TMT & Consumer Investor Conference on Dec 10, 2024, 1:40 p.m. ET.
news.summary: In New York, Workiva Inc. (NYSE:WK), the top cloud platform for assured integrated reporting, will partake in Raymond James' 2024 TMT & Consumer Investor Conference. CEO Julie Iskow is set to present on December 10, 2024, at 1:40 p.m. ET. The event will be live webcast, with a recording accessible for a limited time on Workiva's investor relations site. Workiva Inc. (NYSE:WK) is a leading name in this sector.

news.headline: Anirudh Devgan from Cadence will speak at a Nasdaq event.
news.summary: In the latest data release, it was reported that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 4.2%, marking a significant decrease from the previous quarter. This improvement in employment numbers is a promising sign for the economy, as more than 300,000 new jobs were added in various sectors. The robust job market has also led to a rise in consumer spending by 5.8%, indicating increased confidence and economic activity. Additionally, average hourly wages have seen a 2.5% growth, providing further support for working individuals. Overall, the positive trend in employment and economic indicators suggests a strengthening of the labor market and potential for continued growth in the coming months.

news.headline: OPAL Fuels appoints Darrell Birck as EVP of Biogas. Birck will oversee the company's biogas operations, part of its cleaner fuel mission.
news.summary: WHITE PLAINS, N.Y.-- OPAL Fuels Inc. shared that Darrell P. Birck has been appointed as the new Executive Vice President of Biogas. With OPAL listed on Nasdaq as OPAL, this hiring news comes alongside current Co-CEOs Adam Comora and Jonathan Maurer. Effective immediately, Darrell will oversee the company's biogas construction and operations sectors, aligning with OPAL Fuels' goal of offering affordable and environmentally friendly fuel solutions. This decision aims to enhance the company's commitment to delivering sustainable and cost-effective energy alternatives.
